items.name_en: Top-tier replica M45943 Steel Small Flower ✨ M45960 Steel Brown Trim. Every detail of this Petite Malle handbag draws from Louis Vuitton's trunk-making heritage: the bag's silhouette, iconic Monogram canvas, metal lock and hardware – plus the classic printed lambskin lining.
